jtwc.title: Tropical Storm 05E (Elida) Warning #24 Final Warning
jtwc.text:
WTPN31 PHNC 201600
MSGID/GENADMIN/JOINT TYPHOON WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI//
SUBJ/TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA) WARNING NR 024//
RMKS/
1. TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA) WARNING NR 024    
   02 ACTIVE TROPICAL CYCLONES IN EASTPAC
   MAX SUSTAINED WINDS BASED ON ONE-MINUTE AVERAGE
   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY
    ---
   WARNING POSITION:
   201200Z --- NEAR 25.7N 127.1W
     MOVEMENT PAST SIX HOURS - 355 DEGREES AT 11 KTS
     POSITION ACCURATE TO WITHIN 030 NM
     POSITION BASED ON CENTER LOCATED BY SATELLITE
   PRESENT WIND DISTRIBUTION:

                            060 NM SOUTHEAST QUADRANT

    ---

   210000Z --- 28.5N 127.4W
   MAX SUSTAINED WINDS - 035 KT, GUSTS 045 KT
   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY

   RADIUS OF 034 KT WINDS - 080 NM NORTHEAST QUADRANT
                            000 NM SOUTHEAST QUADRANT
                            000 NM SOUTHWEST QUADRANT
                            070 NM NORTHWEST QUADRANT
   VECTOR TO 24 HR POSIT: 355 DEG/ 13 KTS
    ---
   24 HRS, VALID AT:
   211200Z --- 31.1N 127.6W
   MAX SUSTAINED WINDS - 030 KT, GUSTS 040 KT
   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY
   POST-TROP/REMNT LOW
   VECTOR TO 36 HR POSIT: 005 DEG/ 13 KTS
    ---
   36 HRS, VALID AT:
   220000Z --- 33.6N 127.4W
   MAX SUSTAINED WINDS - 025 KT, GUSTS 035 KT
   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY
   POST-TROP/REMNT LOW
   VECTOR TO 48 HR POSIT: 005 DEG/ 10 KTS
    ---
   EXTENDED OUTLOOK:
   48 HRS, VALID AT:
   221200Z --- 35.6N 127.1W
   MAX SUSTAINED WINDS - 020 KT, GUSTS 030 KT
   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY
   POST-TROP/REMNT LOW
   VECTOR TO 60 HR POSIT: 010 DEG/ 11 KTS
    ---
   60 HRS, VALID AT:
   230000Z --- 37.7N 126.6W
   MAX SUSTAINED WINDS - 015 KT, GUSTS 025 KT
   WIND RADII VALID OVER OPEN WATER ONLY
   DISSIPATED AS A SIGNIFICANT TROPICAL CYCLONE OVER WATER
    ---
REMARKS:
201600Z POSITION NEAR 26.6N 127.2W.
20JUL26. TROPICAL STORM 05E (ELIDA), LOCATED APPROXIMATELY 671 NM
SOUTHWEST OF SAN DIEGO, HAS TRACKED NORTHWARD AT 11 KNOTS OVER
THE PAST SIX HOURS.
THIS IS THE FINAL WARNING ON THIS SYSTEM BY THE JOINT TYPHOON
WRNCEN PEARL HARBOR HI. THE SYSTEM WILL BE CLOSELY MONITORED FOR
SIGNS OF REGENERATION. MINIMUM CENTRAL PRESSURE AT 201200Z IS 998
MB. MAXIMUM SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT AT 201200Z IS 18 FEET.
REFER TO TROPICAL STORM 06E (FAUSTO) WARNINGS (WTPN32 PHNC)
FOR SIX-HOURLY UPDATES.
//
NNNN
